HediffDef.label: Zoogastric obsession
HediffDef.description: This pawn adores being prey for animals. If it ever goes missing, make sure to check the bellies of all your livestock, pets, and the wildlife.

HediffDef.label: Zoogastric interest
HediffDef.description: This pawn likes being prey for animals. It's thrilling to be subject to the inscrutable whims of a beast, not knowing if it might change its mind about its safety, or when it'll decide to release it.

HediffDef.label: Zoogastric ambivalence
HediffDef.description: This pawn doesn't mind being prey for animals, but doesn't prefer it either.

HediffDef.label: Zoogastric disinterest
HediffDef.description: This pawn dislikes being prey for animals. How certain can it be that the beast will listen to demands to be let out?

HediffDef.label: Zoogastric revulsion
HediffDef.description: This pawn hates being prey for animals and will never willingly be consumed by them. It's as disgusting as it is degrading.
